entity.summary: Decentralized derivatives exchange built on a custom OP Stack Layer 2, combining off-chain order matching with on-chain settlement. Aevo supports perpetual futures, options and structured strategies and is operated by the team behind Ribbon Finance.
entity.notes: Launch date is year-level for the Aevo-branded exchange. Ribbon Finance history is treated as team/product lineage rather than a separate predecessor link until a dedicated lineage review is completed.

events.title: Aevo launched as a decentralized derivatives exchange
events.description: Aevo entered operation as a derivatives exchange offering options and perpetual futures with off-chain matching and on-chain settlement on its custom Ethereum Layer 2.
events.notes: Year-level launch marker; no exact day is asserted.

evidence.title: Aevo official website
evidence.notes: Current official site describing active options, perpetuals and strategy products.

evidence.title: Welcome to Aevo
evidence.notes: Official documentation defining Aevo as a decentralized derivatives exchange on a custom OP Stack Layer 2.

evidence.title: Aevo protocol profile
evidence.notes: Independent protocol-directory corroboration used for discovery and current-operation context.
